author: ABC News YouTube
text:
President Trump says he'll try to make Don Jr.'s wedding but it's not 'good timing'
President Trump said he will “try” and make his son Don Jr.’s wedding this weekend, which is reportedly taking place in the Bahamas, though he said the affair is “not good timing” for him given his responsibilities surrounding the war in Iran.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Trump says 'birthright citizenship is a disgrace' while awaiting SCOTUS decision
President Trump called birthright citizenship a "disgrace" while speaking about his administration's Supreme Court case that seeks to effectively end the practice.
 
Trump is asking the justices to uphold his Day 1 executive order eliminating birthright citizenship under a novel interpretation of the 14th Amendment and requiring parents to prove their own legal status before citizenship is granted to their children.

text:
Heavy rainfall, thunderstorms flood streets in New York City
Heavy rainfall in New York City led to flooded streets and subways on Wednesday, causing trouble for commuters.
